dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noTransactions: No transactions yet — add your first one

bills.title: Bills
bills.subtitle: Pick any date range you like (e.g. 7/15 – 8/15) — a daily entry form is generated for each day in the period.
bills.empty: No bills yet — create one to get started
bills.activateFailed: Failed to set as current bill
bills.deleteConfirmDesc: All transactions in this bill will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

form.title: New bill
form.periodRequired: Please select a start and end date
form.name: Bill name (optional)

detail.noRecord: No entries yet for this day

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Categories drive the report statistics. Add, edit, or delete freely — for special notes, just use the note field on an entry.
categories.deleteConfirmDesc: It will no longer appear in the category list, but existing transactions will still show this category's name

errors.CATEGORY_DUPLICATE_NAME: A category with this name already exists for this type
errors.CATEGORY_IN_USE: This category is referenced by existing transactions

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Switching language also switches the currency symbol used for amounts
settings.soundDesc: Play a sound when recording income or expense
settings.defaultCategoryDesc: When set, new income/expense entries will automatically preselect the matching category
settings.syncDesc: Enter your deployed Google Apps Script sync address, then tap "Sync now" to share data with the mobile app.
settings.syncEndpointPlaceholder: Paste the Apps Script URL, e.g. https://script.google.com/macros/s/xxx/exec
settings.syncSuccess: Sync complete — imported {{categories}} categories, {{bills}} bills, {{transactions}} transactions
settings.syncEndpointRequired: Please enter and save a sync address first
